calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-111 novelty drive: measurement-validity fix (raised novelty_bonus_weight, fixed nav_bias one-hot, C0 divergence sanity check)
items.note: 141b FAIL/weakens reclassified measurement-invalid 2026-05-08: bit-identical metrics across NOVELTY_ON/ABLATED arms (entropy -1e-9, cells 52.33, harm 0). Three fixes: (1) novelty_bonus_weight 0.10 -> 100.0 (1000x; brings effective E3 score perturbation from 1e-5 to 1e-2, in score-relevant range), (2) nav_bias action override fixed to one-hot tensor (was [1,ACTION_DIM] random ints argmax'd to action 0), (3) C0 action-divergence sanity check (>=0.10 across warmup); failure writes evidence_direction=non_contributory with bit-identical-arms-measurement-invalid note rather than weakens. nav_bias 0.30 -> 0.50 to clear C5 floor. Mac affinity per cloud-OOM history.

items.title: SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass comparator: forward-model capacity lift (hidden_dim 128->256) + emit_outcome conformance
items.note: 537b ran on Mac 2026-05-08T18:02Z and produced FAIL non_contributory (UNKNOWN-classified due to missing emit_outcome): p2_grad=False on all 3 seeds at p2_steps=48000 (max windows fully exhausted), p2_r2 ceiling 0.65-0.76, harm_forward_r2 0.59-0.66. Decouple-curricula did not recover EXQ-195's 0.91. 537c lifts forward-model hidden_dim 128->256 to address the capacity ceiling. Other config unchanged (training curriculum stays decoupled; P3 eval curriculum ON). Also adds the emit_outcome runner-conformance hook that 537b was missing.
